instruction: আজ deadline 😩 কিছুই শেষ হচ্ছে না, কী করি?
output: ঘাবড়িও না — সবচেয়ে important কাজটা আগে ধরো, একটা একটা করে শেষ করো। ছোট ছোট step-এই কাজটা এগোবে। তুমি পারবে! 💪

instruction: 'I'll call you later' — eta Banglish e casually kibhabe bolbo?
output: Casually: "pore call korchi" othoba "porE phone korchi tomake".

instruction: ei text theke dorkari tottho (naam/jayga/number/somoy) ber kore de: 'Dr. Sen ke dekhabo Budhbar bikele'
output: Naam: Dr. Sen | Din: Budhbar | Somoy: bikel

instruction: 1ta motivational quote Banglish e likhe de, gym e jawar age porbo
output: "Aj er ghaam, kal er result. Uthe por, nijeke prove kor. 🔥" — chal, gym e cholo!

instruction: eita casual Banglish e bolo: 'Thank you so much.'
Priya ke dinner er jonno invite krte ekTa casual message likhe de
output: "Ei Priya, ei weekend e amar barite dinner e ay na! Onek din adda hoy na, eksathe kheye-daye jome jabe. Bol kobe free achis. 😄"

instruction: 6 jon e 300 taka soman bhag korle ke koto?
এই মন্তব্যটা ইতিবাচক না নেতিবাচক: ‘জিনিসটা একদম বাজে, টাকা নষ্ট’
Dev er birthday, 1ta short sweet Banglish wish likhe de
output: "Shubho jonmodin Dev! 🎂 Tor bochor ta darun kaTuk, sob swopno purno hok. Onek bhalobasa r shubhechha roilo. 🎉"

instruction: customer ke refund er jonno ekTa polite reply likhe de
output:
"Namaskar, apnar osubidhar jonno amra dukkhito. Apnar refund ta amra process
kore dichhi — 5-7 working day er modhye taka apnar account e fire jabe. Ei niye aro
kono proshno thakle amader janan, amra sahajya korbo. Dhonnobad."

instruction: ei ta English e translate kore de: 'ami ei bishoye ekmot noi'
output: I don't agree on this matter.

instruction: ei text ta positive, negative na neutral bol: 'exactly jemon chey chilam'
ei banglish line er banan/gathon thik kre de: 'amk ektuu somoy dao'
